## tscli set device authorization

Set device authorization status

### Synopsis

Approve or reject a Tailscale device by ID.

```
tscli set device authorization [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --approve         Approve (true) or reject (false) the device (default true)
      --device string   Device ID to authorize (nodeId "node-abc123" or numeric id). Example: --device=node-abcdef123456
  -h, --help            help for authorization
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
